route_via.note: Marion on I-40 -- pins to the I-40 route (I-77 north to Statesville, then I-40 west through Hickory, Marion, Asheville). ORS otherwise takes US-74 through Shelby, off the curated I-40 stops (Marion, Waynesville).

stops.source: OpenStreetMap/Overpass development-time corridor amenity query, accessed 2026-06-21; curated into a gameplay POI (clean name, normalized category) without raw OSM IDs. Truck access: No verified truck access: OpenStreetMap records no hgv allowance, truck parking, or truck-stop classification at this location (checked 2026-07-19). Generic fuel stations default to bobtail_only per the truck-accessibility policy.
